failure_reason: Turned the mutable idea/spec native front-door flip into A/B observation. The harness compares A no-header fanout-python against B X-Form-Native-Preview native-kernel SQL preview across POST/PATCH ideas and POST/PATCH/DELETE spec registry routes. It observed 5/5 passing cases, confidence 1.0, gate_pass true, recommendation promote_to_live_db_trial, and kept ordinary_traffic_flip_performed=false and ordinary_traffic_flip_allowed=false. Live DB execution, response projection, cache/edge side effects, and contributor-key audit side effects remain required before ordinary public traffic can move.
